quote: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
author: Lewis Carroll

quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

quote: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.

quote: Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
author: William Shakespeare

quote: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
author: Audrey Hepburn

quote: Where there is love there is life.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies.
author: Aristotle

quote: The greatest thing you'll ever learn is just to love and be loved in return.
author: Eden Ahbez

quote: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
author: David Viscott

quote: Love is not finding someone to live with, it's finding someone you can't live without.
author: Rafael Cortez

quote: The heart wants what it wants.
author: Woody Allen

quote: I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.
author: Roy Croft

quote: Being deeply loved by someone gives you strength, while loving someone deeply gives you courage.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched - they must be felt with the heart.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
author: John Lennon

quote: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
author: Confucius

quote: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
author: Helen Keller

quote: Get busy living or get busy dying.
author: Stephen King

quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
author: Mae West

quote: Life is short, and it is up to you to make it sweet.
author: Sarah Louise Delany

quote: The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

quote: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: Every storm runs out of rain.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Tears come from the heart and not from the brain.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

quote: There is no pain so great as the memory of joy in present grief.
author: Aeschylus

quote: The risk of love is loss, and the price of loss is grief. But the pain of grief is only a shadow when compared to the pain of never risking love.
author: Hilary Stanton Zunin

quote: Grief is the price we pay for love.
author: Queen Elizabeth II

quote: Sadness is but a wall between two gardens.
author: Khalil Gibran

quote: The word 'happy' would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness.
author: Carl Jung

quote: One can never consent to creep when one feels an impulse to soar.

quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.

quote: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.

quote: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.

quote: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.

quote: The road to success and the road to failure are almost exactly the same.

quote: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.

quote: It is better to fail in originality than to succeed in imitation.

quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.

quote: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering, the fourth practicing, the fifth teaching others.

quote: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.

quote: By three methods we may learn wisdom: First, by reflection, which is noblest; Second, by imitation, which is easiest; and third by experience, which is the bitterest.

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.

quote: The doorstep to the temple of wisdom is a knowledge of our own ignorance.

quote: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.

quote: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.

quote: The doorstep to the temple of wisdom is a knowledge of our own ignorance.

quote: Friendship is born at that moment when one person says to another, 'What! You too? I thought I was the only one.'

quote: A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.

quote: A good friend is like a four-leaf clover: hard to find and lucky to have.

quote: Friends are the siblings God never gave us.

quote: The greatest gift of life is friendship, and I have received it.

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.

quote: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.

quote: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.

quote: Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are in harmony.

quote: Count your age by friends, not years. Count your life by smiles, not tears.

quote: Happiness is not a goal...it's a by-product of a life well lived.

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

quote: Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
author: Buddha

quote: You will not be punished for your anger, you will be punished by your anger.
author: Buddha

quote: In the end, only three things matter: how much you loved, how gently you lived, and how gracefully you let go.
author: Buddha

quote: Holding on to anger is like grasping a hot coal with the intent of throwing it at someone else; you are the one who gets burned.
author: Buddha

quote: No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.
author: Buddha

quote: The roots of the practice of compassion rest on the recognition that others love themselves as we love ourselves.
author: Buddha

quote: The trouble is, you think you have time.
author: Buddha

quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
author: Buddha

quote: You, yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
author: Buddha

quote: An idea that is developed and put into action is more important than an idea that exists only as an idea.
author: Buddha

quote: When you realize how perfect everything is, you will tilt your head back and laugh at the sky.
author: Buddha

quote: There is no path to happiness: happiness is the path.
author: Buddha

quote: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: If you want others to be happy, practice compassion. If you want to be happy, practice compassion.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Be kind whenever possible. It is always possible.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Know the rules well, so you can break them effectively.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: The more you are motivated by love, the more fearless and free your actions will be.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Old friends pass away, new friends appear. It is just like the days. An old day passes, a new day accepts. The important thing is to make it meaningful—a meaningful day.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: In the practice of tolerance, one's enemy is the best teacher.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: It is very important to generate a good attitude, a good heart, as much as possible. From this, success in all activities will follow.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: When you talk, you are only repeating what you already know. But when you listen, you may learn something new.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: The way of water is to flow downward.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Being deeply loved by someone gives you strength, while loving someone deeply gives you courage.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compare or compete, everybody will respect you.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you do not change direction, you may end up where you are heading.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Great acts are made up of small deeds.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To attain knowledge, add things every day. To attain wisdom, remove things every day.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who conquers others is strong; he who conquers himself is mighty.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them; that only creates sorrow. Let reality be reality.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To lead people, walk beside them... As for the best leaders, the people do not notice their existence. The next best, the people honor and praise. The next, the people fear; and the next, the people hate... When the best leader's work is done the people say, 'We did it ourselves!'
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Those who know do not speak. Those who speak do not know.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you realize that all things change, there is nothing you will try to hold on to. If you are not afraid of the dying body, you will have no fear of the deathless.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Stop thinking, and end your problems.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Respond intelligently even to unintelligent treatment.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Master others and be intelligent. Master yourself and be disciplined.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who is contented is rich.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The flame that burns twice as bright burns half as long.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Care about what other people think and you will always be their prisoner.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When there is no desire, all things are at peace.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: A leader is best when people barely know he exists, when his work is done, his aim fulfilled, they will say: we did it ourselves.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Do the difficult things while they are easy and do the great things while they are small. A journey of a thousand miles must begin with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Watch your thoughts, they become your words.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To realize the unchanging truth and become free from fear—this is the supreme blessing.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To understand everything is to forgive everything.
author: Buddha

quote: The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.

quote: What you are is what you have been. What you'll be is what you do now.

quote: Pain is certain, suffering is optional.
author: Buddha

quote: There is nothing more dreadful than the habit of doubt. Doubt separates people. It is a poison that disintegrates friendships and breaks up pleasant relations.
author: Buddha

quote: Purity or impurity depends on oneself. No one can purify another.
author: Buddha

quote: Just as a snake sheds its skin, we must shed our past over and over again.
author: Buddha

quote: You can search throughout the entire universe for someone who is more deserving of your love and affection than you are yourself, and that person is not to be found anywhere. You, yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
author: Buddha

quote: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth, faithfulness the best relationship.
author: Buddha

quote: Every morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
author: Buddha

quote: Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
author: Buddha

quote: Better than a thousand hollow words, is one word that brings peace.
author: Buddha

quote: If you light a lamp for somebody, it will also brighten your path.
author: Buddha

quote: We are shaped by our thoughts; we become what we think.
author: Buddha

quote: However many holy words you read, however many you speak, what good will they do you if you do not act on upon them?
author: Buddha

quote: The trouble is, you think you have time.
author: Buddha

quote: You will not be punished for your anger; you will be punished by your anger.
author: Buddha

quote: Doubt everything. Find your own light.

quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

quote: Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle. Happiness never decreases by being shared.
author: Buddha

quote: Every human being is the author of his own health or disease.
author: Buddha

quote: The root of suffering is attachment.
author: Buddha

quote: No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.
author: Buddha

quote: You, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.
author: Buddha

quote: Conquer anger with non-anger. Conquer badness with goodness. Conquer miserliness with generosity. Conquer falsehood with truth.
author: Buddha

quote: Holding on to anger is like grasping a hot coal with the intent of throwing it at someone else; you are the one who gets burned.
author: Buddha

quote: There is nothing more dreadful than the habit of doubt.
author: Buddha

quote: In a controversy the instant we feel anger we have already ceased striving for the truth, and have begun striving for ourselves.
author: Buddha

quote: It is better to travel well than to arrive.
author: Buddha

quote: What you think, you become.
author: Buddha

quote: Your worst enemy cannot harm you as much as your own unguarded thoughts.
author: Buddha

quote: Nothing ever exists entirely alone; everything is connected to everything else.
author: Buddha

quote: To understand everything is to forgive everything.
author: Buddha

quote: Life is so very hard. How can we be anything but kind?
author: Buddha

quote: We are what we think. All that we are arises with our thoughts. With our thoughts, we make the world.
author: Buddha

quote: When you realize how perfect everything is, you will tilt your head back and laugh at the sky.
author: Buddha

quote: There is no path to happiness: happiness is the path.
author: Buddha

quote: Pain is certain, suffering is optional.
author: Buddha

quote: Nothing can harm you as much as your own thoughts unguarded.
author: Buddha

quote: The gift of truth exceeds all other gifts.
author: Buddha

quote: By letting it go it all gets done. The world is won by those who let it go. But when you try and try, the world is beyond the winning.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Be content with what you have; rejoice in the way things are. When you realize there is nothing lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When there is no desire, all things are at peace.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The wise man is one who knows what he does not know.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Knowing others is intelligence; knowing yourself is true wisdom. Mastering others is strength; mastering yourself is true power.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compare or compete, everybody will respect you.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you do not change direction, you may end up where you are heading.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them; that only creates sorrow. Let reality be reality.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you realize that all things change, there is nothing you will try to hold on to.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To attain knowledge, add things every day. To attain wisdom, remove things every day.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who conquers others is strong; he who conquers himself is mighty.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Care about what other people think and you will always be their prisoner.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Great acts are made up of small deeds.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who is contented is rich.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The flame that burns twice as bright burns half as long.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Respond intelligently even to unintelligent treatment.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Those who know do not speak. Those who speak do not know.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To realize the unchanging truth and become free from fear—this is the supreme blessing.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Stop thinking, and end your problems.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Do the difficult things while they are easy and do the great things while they are small.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Watch your thoughts, they become your words.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: A leader is best when people barely know he exists, when his work is done, his aim fulfilled, they will say: we did it ourselves.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for his own.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Master others and be intelligent. Master yourself and be disciplined.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The world belongs to those who let it go.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When you realize that your desires are the source of your suffering, you stop desiring.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Act without expectation.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you want to learn about the past, look at the present. If you want to learn about the present, look at the future.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To lead people, walk beside them.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When you realize nothing is lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Those who know do not speak. Those who speak do not know.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: I have three precious things which I hold fast and prize: the first, gentleness; the second, frugality; the third, humility, which keep me from pushing myself before others or asserting myself.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: If you would take, you must first give, this is the beginning of intelligence.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The wise man is shy and timid; the fool is unruly and full of pride.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To attain knowledge, add things every day. To attain wisdom, remove things every day.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Give a man a fish and you feed him for a day. Teach him how to fish and you feed him for a lifetime.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The wise man is not concerned with what is right or what is wrong, but with what is necessary.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To know that you do not know is the best. To pretend to know when you do not know is a disease.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them; that only creates sorrow.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The more you know, the less you understand.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Respond intelligently even to unintelligent treatment.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When you are content to be simply yourself and don't compare or compete, everybody will respect you.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The truth is not always beautiful, nor beautiful words the truth.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To lead people, walk beside them.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Stop thinking, and end your problems.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: When there is no desire, all things are at peace.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: To realize the unchanging truth and become free from fear—this is the supreme blessing.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: The wise man knows that he knows nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

quote: Be kind, for everyone you meet is fighting a hard battle.
author: Plato

quote: Be willing to be a beginner every single morning.
author: Meister Eckhart

quote: The only journey is the one within.
author: Rainer Maria Rilke

quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survive, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
author: Charles Darwin

quote: Imagination is everything. It is the preview of life's coming attractions.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The true sign of intelligence is not knowledge but imagination.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: If A is success in life, then A = x + y + z. Work is x; play is y and z is keeping your mouth shut.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Two things are infinite: the universe and human stupidity; and I'm not sure about the universe.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Everyone is a genius at least once a year. The real geniuses simply have their bright ideas closer together.
author: Georg Christoph Lichtenberg

quote: The difference between stupidity and genius is that genius has its limits.
author: Albert Einstein
